name: Dispatch

values.name: add
values.comment: Add an event-handler to the current configuration
values.type: String -> Maybe Options -> Decoder msg -> Config msg -> Config msg

values.name: clear
values.comment: Clear event handlers in current configuration

values.name: getDecoder
values.type: Config msg -> Maybe (Decoder (List msg) -> Decoder msg)

values.name: on
values.comment: Dispatch multiple decoders for a single event.
values.type: String -> (List msg -> msg) -> List (Decoder msg) -> Attribute msg

values.name: onWithOptions
values.comment:
Dispatch multiple decoders for a single event.
Options apply to the whole event.
values.type: String -> (List msg -> msg) -> Options -> List (Decoder msg) -> Attribute msg

values.name: setDecoder
values.comment: Tell Dispatch how to convert a list of decoders into a decoder for a single message.
values.type: (Decoder (List msg) -> Decoder msg) -> Config msg -> Config msg

values.name: setMsg
values.comment:
Tell Dispatch how to convert a list of messages into a single message. Alternative
to `setDecoder`.
values.type: (List msg -> msg) -> Config msg -> Config msg

values.name: toAttributes
values.comment:
Returns a list of `Html.Attribute` containing handlers that
dispatch multiple decoders on a single `Html.Event`

values.name: update
values.comment:
Runs the given `update` on all the messages and
returns the updated model including batching of
any commands returned by running the `update`.
values.type: (msg -> model -> ( model, Cmd obs )) -> List msg -> model -> ( model, Cmd obs )
